heading: Official Theme Song
title: "Legends Rise in the Meta Games"
subtitle: Meta Games OST

poster.alt: Legends Rise in the Meta Games OST Poster

caption: Launching of the Official OST of Meta Games entitled: Legends Rise in the Meta Games

lyrics.label: Verse 1
text: Here is where we carve our name
this is more than just a game
We level up with each new quest
and prove ourselves as the very best.

lyrics.label: Verse 2
text: Our minds are sharp, our skills refined
in this world where anything can be
We rise to challenge, wild and free

lyrics.label: Chorus
text: Until the final victory is won.
To lead the world in every way.
